text: Liberty Chowk pe pani bhar gaya, gaariyan phans gayi hain. Koi solution nahi?
translated: Liberty Chowk is flooded, cars are stuck. No solution?

text: Canal Road bilkul band ho gaya hai, knee-deep pani hai. WASA kahan hai?
translated: Canal Road is completely closed, knee-deep water. Where is WASA?

text: Major flooding at Liberty underpass. At least 12 vehicles stranded. RESCUE 1122 needed urgently.
MM Alam Road pe bhi paani aa gaya. Gulberg me traffic completely jam hai. Bachao!
translated: MM Alam Road also flooded. Gulberg traffic completely jammed.

text: Liberty underpass mein gaari doob gayi. Please Canal Road avoid karo.
translated: Car submerged in Liberty underpass. Please avoid Canal Road.

text: Worst flooding I have seen at Liberty Chowk. Roads are rivers. Use Jail Road alternate route!
Jail Road pe bhi traffic backup shuru ho gaya Canal Road band hone ki wajah se.
translated: Jail Road also getting traffic backup because Canal Road is closed.

text: Water level at Liberty Chowk is dangerously high. Emergency services please respond. Children stuck in school buses.
Gulberg main drain overflow ho gaya. Dukanen bhi doob rahi hain. Khuda ka waasta WASA ko bhejo.
translated: Gulberg main drain overflowed. Shops also flooding. Please send WASA.

text: WASA drainage completely overwhelmed at Liberty. Second hour of flooding with no response seen.
Liberty Chowk ke paas bijli bhi chali gayi. Andhere mein paani ka koi andaza nahi.
translated: Electricity gone near Liberty Chowk. Cannot gauge water level in the dark.

text: Traffic at standstill on Canal Road. Speed down to almost zero. Massive flooding incident.
Ambulance bhi phans gayi Canal Road pe. Serious emergency hai. 1122 ko call karo!
translated: Ambulance also stuck on Canal Road. Serious emergency. Call 1122!
